_meta.name: Apple Docs
_meta.description: Search and read Apple's official developer documentation from the live DocC data layer — 4 tools, no auth
_meta.notes: Requires npm build before first use. No API key. Fetches docs on demand and caches JSON under $XDG_CACHE_HOME/apple-docs-mcp.

_meta.name: App Store Connect
_meta.description: Full App Store Connect API — CI/CD, TestFlight, submissions, IAP, and more (80+ tools)
_meta.notes: Requires npm build before first use. Auth via App Store Connect API key (.p8 file).
